zh-CN.title: 均衡整合型
zh-CN.one_liner: 你不是只擅长某一项，而是较能把觉察、调节、共情和关系处理连起来。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你通常能看见自己的状态，也能顾及他人的感受，并把情绪信息转成相对稳定的沟通和行动。
evidence_basis: Four dimensions high or upper-stable; no severe gap.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 复杂对话里，你更容易同时顾及事实、情绪和关系目标。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 优势太均衡时，你可能低估持续恢复和边界维护的必要性。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把稳定优势转成可复用的沟通流程，而不是只靠当下状态。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你不是只擅长某一项，而是较能把觉察、调节、共情和关系处理连起来。

en.title: Integrated Balance
en.one_liner: Your strength is not one isolated skill; it is the way awareness, regulation, empathy, and relationship handling tend to work together.
en.core_claim: You usually notice your own state, register other people’s feelings, and turn emotional information into relatively steady communication and action.
evidence_basis: Four dimensions high or upper-stable; no severe gap.
en.primary_strength: In complex conversations, you are more likely to hold the facts, the emotions, and the relationship goal at the same time.
en.likely_cost: When things are going well, you may underestimate how much recovery and boundary maintenance still matter.
en.development_lever: Turn your strengths into repeatable communication routines, rather than relying on being in a good state.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: Your strength is not one isolated skill; it is the way awareness, regulation, empathy, and relationship handling tend to work together.

meta.trigger_summary: Four dimensions high or upper-stable; no severe gap.

zh-CN.title: 高共情，低恢复
zh-CN.one_liner: 你很容易接住别人的感受，但不一定能很快把自己从对方情绪里带回来。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的共情不是问题；真正的杠杆是共情之后如何区分陪伴、责任和恢复。
evidence_basis: EM high; ER low or medium-low.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你能让别人感到被理解，尤其在对方情绪明显但没有说清楚时。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 你可能把“我理解你”滑向“我必须替你扛住”。
zh-CN.development_lever: 练习共情后的边界句和恢复动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你很容易接住别人的感受，但不一定能很快把自己从对方情绪里带回来。

en.title: High Empathy, Low Recovery
en.one_liner: You often pick up other people’s feelings quickly, but you may not recover from carrying them just as quickly.
en.core_claim: Your empathy is not the problem. The leverage point is what happens after empathy: companionship, responsibility, and recovery need clearer separation.
evidence_basis: EM high; ER low or medium-low.
en.primary_strength: You can make people feel understood, especially when their emotion is obvious but not clearly stated.
en.likely_cost: You may slide from “I understand this” into “I have to carry this with you or for you.”
en.development_lever: Practice boundary language and recovery steps after empathic contact.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You often pick up other people’s feelings quickly, but you may not recover from carrying them just as quickly.

meta.trigger_summary: EM high; ER low or medium-low.

zh-CN.title: 有觉察，调节不足
zh-CN.one_liner: 你常常知道自己被触发了，但还没有总能把自己带回稳定状态。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的优势在于看见内在变化；发展点在于把“我知道”变成“我能暂停和恢复”。
evidence_basis: SA high; ER low or medium-low.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你能比很多人更快识别自己的情绪线索。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 觉察越清楚，若缺少调节步骤，越可能变成反复分析或内耗。
zh-CN.development_lever: 给觉察配一个身体层面的暂停动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你常常知道自己被触发了，但还没有总能把自己带回稳定状态。

en.title: Aware, Not Yet Settled
en.one_liner: You often know you have been triggered, but you may not always be able to bring yourself back to steadiness in time.
en.core_claim: Your strength is noticing the inner shift; the next step is turning “I know what is happening” into “I can pause and recover.”
evidence_basis: SA high; ER low or medium-low.
en.primary_strength: You can often identify your emotional cues faster than many people.
en.likely_cost: Clear awareness without regulation steps can turn into replaying, overanalyzing, or emotional fatigue.
en.development_lever: Pair awareness with a physical pause that slows the next response.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You often know you have been triggered, but you may not always be able to bring yourself back to steadiness in time.

meta.trigger_summary: SA high; ER low or medium-low.

zh-CN.title: 冷静稳定，但情绪回应偏弱
zh-CN.one_liner: 你能稳住局面，但别人不一定感到自己的情绪被你接住。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的调节能力能降低混乱，但如果少了情绪回应，稳定会被误读成疏离。
evidence_basis: ER high; EM low or medium-low.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 压力高时，你更容易保持思路和节奏。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 别人可能听到了你的解决方案，却没有感到被理解。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在解决问题前先命名对方的感受。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你能稳住局面，但别人不一定感到自己的情绪被你接住。

en.title: Calm, but Hard to Read Warmly
en.one_liner: You may keep the situation steady, while others may not always feel emotionally met.
en.core_claim: Your regulation can reduce chaos, but without emotional acknowledgment, steadiness can be mistaken for distance.
evidence_basis: ER high; EM low or medium-low.
en.primary_strength: Under pressure, you are more likely to keep your thinking and pacing intact.
en.likely_cost: People may hear your solution without feeling that you understood the emotional weight of the moment.
en.development_lever: Name the other person’s feeling before moving into problem-solving.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You may keep the situation steady, while others may not always feel emotionally met.

meta.trigger_summary: ER high; EM low or medium-low.

zh-CN.title: 关系优先，自我后置
zh-CN.one_liner: 你很会维护关系，但有时把自己的真实感受排到太后面。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你会照顾气氛、流程和他人的反应；发展点是不要让关系稳定建立在自我忽略上。
evidence_basis: RM high; SA low or medium-low.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你常能让对话继续进行，不轻易让场面崩掉。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 你可能很晚才发现自己其实已经不舒服。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在回应别人前先问自己一句：我现在真实需要什么？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你很会维护关系，但有时把自己的真实感受排到太后面。

en.title: Relationship First, Self Later
en.one_liner: You are often good at keeping relationships moving, but your own feelings may get pushed too far down the list.
en.core_claim: You can manage tone, flow, and other people’s reactions; the growth point is making sure relational stability does not depend on self-erasure.
evidence_basis: RM high; SA low or medium-low.
en.primary_strength: You often keep conversations going without letting the room collapse emotionally.
en.likely_cost: You may realize late that you were uncomfortable much earlier.
en.development_lever: Before responding to others, ask: what do I actually need right now?
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You are often good at keeping relationships moving, but your own feelings may get pushed too far down the list.

meta.trigger_summary: RM high; SA low or medium-low.

zh-CN.title: 自我清楚，修复不足
zh-CN.one_liner: 你知道自己要表达什么，但关系修复的步骤可能还不够细。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的自我觉察让表达更清楚；发展点是让对方也能接住你的表达。
evidence_basis: SA high; RM low or medium-low.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你不容易完全失去自己的立场。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果缺少修复，清楚可能被听成强硬。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在表达后补上影响确认和关系修复。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你知道自己要表达什么，但关系修复的步骤可能还不够细。

en.title: Clear About Self, Less Practiced at Repair
en.one_liner: You may know what you need to say, but the repair steps after impact may need more structure.
en.core_claim: Your self-awareness can make your expression clear; the next step is making that expression easier for another person to receive.
evidence_basis: SA high; RM low or medium-low.
en.primary_strength: You are less likely to lose track of your own position.
en.likely_cost: Without repair, clarity can be heard as sharpness.
en.development_lever: After expressing yourself, add impact-checking and repair language.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You may know what you need to say, but the repair steps after impact may need more structure.

meta.trigger_summary: SA high; RM low or medium-low.

zh-CN.title: 稳定协作者
zh-CN.one_liner: 你在压力下通常能把对话拉回问题本身，而不是被情绪完全带走。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的优势在于把稳定和关系推进结合起来。
evidence_basis: ER high; RM high.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你适合做对话里的降温者和整理者。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 你可能低估别人还需要被情绪回应，而不只是被推进。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在推动下一步前，补一句情绪确认。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你在压力下通常能把对话拉回问题本身，而不是被情绪完全带走。

en.title: Steady Collaborator
en.one_liner: Under pressure, you can often bring the conversation back to the issue rather than letting emotion take over.
en.core_claim: Your strength is combining steadiness with relationship movement.
evidence_basis: ER high; RM high.
en.primary_strength: You can be the person who cools the room down and organizes the next step.
en.likely_cost: You may underestimate that others sometimes need emotional acknowledgment, not only forward motion.
en.development_lever: Before moving the group forward, add one sentence of emotional acknowledgment.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: Under pressure, you can often bring the conversation back to the issue rather than letting emotion take over.

meta.trigger_summary: ER high; RM high.

zh-CN.title: 高敏感，易吸收
zh-CN.one_liner: 你对自己和他人的情绪都很敏锐，但容易把太多信号带回身体里。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你捕捉细节的能力很强；真正要保护的是情绪能量的进出边界。
evidence_basis: SA high; EM high; ER medium-low.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你能注意到别人没说出口的变化。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 你可能在事情结束后还长时间停留在对方的情绪里。
zh-CN.development_lever: 建立“接收—整理—放下”的结束仪式。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你对自己和他人的情绪都很敏锐，但容易把太多信号带回身体里。

en.title: Sensitive and Absorbing
en.one_liner: You are sensitive to both your own feelings and other people’s signals, but you may carry too much of that information in your body afterward.
en.core_claim: Your ability to catch subtle cues is strong; what needs protection is the boundary around emotional intake and recovery.
evidence_basis: SA high; EM high; ER medium-low.
en.primary_strength: You can notice shifts that other people have not put into words.
en.likely_cost: After the moment is over, you may still be living inside someone else’s emotional weather.
en.development_lever: Build a small closing ritual for receiving, sorting, and releasing emotional information.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You are sensitive to both your own feelings and other people’s signals, but you may carry too much of that information in your body afterward.

meta.trigger_summary: SA high; EM high; ER medium-low.

zh-CN.title: 基础发展中
zh-CN.one_liner: 你的结果更像在提示：先把情绪命名、暂停和基本沟通步骤搭起来。
zh-CN.core_claim: 现在不需要急着追求复杂技巧；先建立稳定的观察和回应习惯。
evidence_basis: Multiple dimensions low or low-medium.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 你有机会从很小的练习中看到明显变化。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果直接进入复杂关系策略，容易觉得抽象或挫败。
zh-CN.development_lever: 从每天一次情绪命名和一个暂停句开始。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你的结果更像在提示：先把情绪命名、暂停和基本沟通步骤搭起来。

en.title: Building the Foundation
en.one_liner: Your result suggests that the first step is building the basics: naming emotion, pausing, and using simple communication steps.
en.core_claim: You do not need advanced strategies first. You need stable habits for noticing, pausing, and responding.
evidence_basis: Multiple dimensions low or low-medium.
en.primary_strength: Small practices may create noticeable change because the foundation is still forming.
en.likely_cost: If you jump straight into complex relationship strategies, the work may feel abstract or discouraging.
en.development_lever: Start with one emotion label and one pause sentence each day.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: Your result suggests that the first step is building the basics: naming emotion, pausing, and using simple communication steps.

meta.trigger_summary: Multiple dimensions low or low-medium.

zh-CN.title: 本次结果需要谨慎阅读
zh-CN.one_liner: 这次结果更适合作为初步参考，而不是强结论。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的作答状态可能影响了解释稳定性；报告可以帮助你回顾作答方式，但不宜用它做重大判断。
evidence_basis: Quality C/D or severe response-quality flags.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 即使置信度不高，也能用来发现哪些题型或场景让你犹豫。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果把它当成完整画像，容易误读自己。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在状态更稳定时复测，并优先回顾自己为何选择集中或过快。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 这次结果更适合作为初步参考，而不是强结论。

en.title: Read This Result Lightly
en.one_liner: This result is better treated as a first pass, not a strong conclusion.
en.core_claim: Your response pattern may have affected interpretive stability. The report can help you reflect on how you answered, but it should not carry too much weight.
evidence_basis: Quality C/D or severe response-quality flags.
en.primary_strength: Even with lower confidence, the result can show where you hesitated or answered in a concentrated way.
en.likely_cost: If you treat it as a full profile, you may overread the result.
en.development_lever: Retest in a steadier state and review why your answers were unusually fast, concentrated, or inconsistent.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: This result is better treated as a first pass, not a strong conclusion.

meta.trigger_summary: Quality C/D or severe response-quality flags.

zh-CN.title: 低估自己的修复者
zh-CN.one_liner: 你可能比自己以为的更能修复关系，只是对自己的关系处理信心不足。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你可能比自己以为的更能修复关系，只是对自己的关系处理信心不足。
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把这个模式转成一个具体、可重复的沟通动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你可能比自己以为的更能修复关系，只是对自己的关系处理信心不足。

en.title: Underconfident Repairer
en.one_liner: You may be more capable of repairing relationships than you give yourself credit for.
en.core_claim: You may be more capable of repairing relationships than you give yourself credit for.
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
en.primary_strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.likely_cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.development_lever: Turn the pattern into one concrete, repeatable communication move.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You may be more capable of repairing relationships than you give yourself credit for.

meta.trigger_summary: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.

zh-CN.title: 过度负责的帮助者
zh-CN.one_liner: 你很愿意帮忙，但容易把支持变成替别人承担。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你很愿意帮忙，但容易把支持变成替别人承担。
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把这个模式转成一个具体、可重复的沟通动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你很愿意帮忙，但容易把支持变成替别人承担。

en.title: Over-Responsible Helper
en.one_liner: You want to be useful, but support can turn into carrying what is not yours.
en.core_claim: You want to be useful, but support can turn into carrying what is not yours.
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
en.primary_strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.likely_cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.development_lever: Turn the pattern into one concrete, repeatable communication move.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You want to be useful, but support can turn into carrying what is not yours.

meta.trigger_summary: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.

zh-CN.title: 反应快，暂停短
zh-CN.one_liner: 你捕捉到刺激后反应很快，发展点是把第一反应和正式回应分开。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你捕捉到刺激后反应很快，发展点是把第一反应和正式回应分开。
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把这个模式转成一个具体、可重复的沟通动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你捕捉到刺激后反应很快，发展点是把第一反应和正式回应分开。

en.title: Fast Reactor
en.one_liner: You react quickly once something lands; the growth point is separating first reaction from final response.
en.core_claim: You react quickly once something lands; the growth point is separating first reaction from final response.
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
en.primary_strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.likely_cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.development_lever: Turn the pattern into one concrete, repeatable communication move.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You react quickly once something lands; the growth point is separating first reaction from final response.

meta.trigger_summary: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.

zh-CN.title: 先分析，后感受
zh-CN.one_liner: 你倾向先整理逻辑，情绪可能在之后才追上来。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你倾向先整理逻辑，情绪可能在之后才追上来。
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
zh-CN.primary_strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把这个模式转成一个具体、可重复的沟通动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你倾向先整理逻辑，情绪可能在之后才追上来。

en.title: Analytical Before Feeling
en.one_liner: You tend to organize the logic first; the feeling may arrive later.
en.core_claim: You tend to organize the logic first; the feeling may arrive later.
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
en.primary_strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.likely_cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.development_lever: Turn the pattern into one concrete, repeatable communication move.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You tend to organize the logic first; the feeling may arrive later.

meta.trigger_summary: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.

zh-CN.title: 安静共情型
zh-CN.one_liner: 你会在心里理解别人，但不总把理解表达出来。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你会在心里理解别人，但不总把理解表达出来。

zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是结果解释的组织方式，不是固定人格标签，也不是能力凭证。
zh-CN.share_line: 你可能用沉默换取平静，但未处理的问题会留在关系里。

en.title: Conflict Avoider
en.one_liner: You may trade silence for calm, but the unaddressed issue remains in the relationship.
en.core_claim: You may trade silence for calm, but the unaddressed issue remains in the relationship.
evidence_basis: Specific score pattern or route-level pattern match.
en.primary_strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.likely_cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.development_lever: Turn the pattern into one concrete, repeatable communication move.
en.do_not_overread: This is an interpretive pattern, not a fixed identity label or capability credential.
en.share_line: You may trade silence for calm, but the unaddressed issue remains in the relationship.
